answer:
The Pylon API uses Bearer authentication [1][2]. To authenticate, you must generate an API token from your Pylon dashboard and include it in the Authorization header of your HTTP requests [1][3].

You must use the following header format, replacing `<token>` with your actual secret API token [1][3]:

```
Authorization: Bearer <token>
```

All requests must be made over HTTPS, as the API will return an error if a non-HTTPS URL is used [3]. You can verify that your token is configured correctly by making a request to the `/me` endpoint [1].

results.title: Pylon — API Provider, Schemas | APIs.io Providers
